existing_features.title: When the history icon is clicked in the ActivitySection component, display the ActivityTimeline component with the exact visual design shown in the uploaded image: vertical timeline with circular markers, connecting lines, timestamps on the left, and colored comment boxes (light blue, light purple, light green) with single-sentence text
Update dummy comments data to be exactly one short sentence each, matching the concise style shown in the uploaded image examples
